title: Tender Light Tunisian Duck Stir-fry
description: A vegetarian-friendly and mildly-flavored dish that features tender duck-like flavors without the meat. It's a light, temperate take on a classic Tunisian recipe.

ingredients.name: 1 cup tofu
ingredients.notes: Replaceable with tempeh or seitan for meat-like texture

ingredients.name: 2 bell peppers (any color), sliced
ingredients.notes: Add for a vibrant pop of color and texture

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp dried herbs (oregano, thyme, sumac, or za'atar)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and onions, sauté until translucent.
Stir in bell peppers and cook for about 5 minutes or until softened.
Fold in drained chickpeas and add lemon juice. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Sprinkle dried herbs on top of the mixture.
Season with salt and pepper as desired.
Taste test, adding more herbs if necessary for a pleasant bittersweet balance.
Serve immediately over quinoa or rice for a complete meal.
